title: BluebeamConfig
description: BluebeamConfig: Set up configuration settings for pulling from Bluebeam SAP markups.

OpeningLayerName.description: What is the layer name used in the Bluebeam SAP markups to define openings.

WallLayerName.description: What is the layer name used in the Bluebeam SAP markups to define walls (external or internal).

RoofLayerName.description: What is the layer name used in the Bluebeam SAP markups to define roofs.

FloorLayerName.description: What is the layer name used in the Bluebeam SAP markups to define floor areas.

ThermalBridgeLayerName.description: What is the layer name used in the Bluebeam SAP markups to define thermal bridging.

LivingAreaLayerName.description: What is the layer name used in the Bluebeam SAP markups to define living zones.

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
